generated_oml:
namespace DTDFVocab = "http://example.org/dtdf/vocab"
namespace base = "http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#"

instance OptimalControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic control of crane movements for precision",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated logging of crane state data to TimescaleDB",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of crane operational state for monitoring"
]

instance ModelSynchronizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous verification of alignment between physical crane and digital twin models"
]

instance Fusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD modeling and kinematic simulation software for crane geometry and motion"
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Python program that collects data from physical crane sensors and transmits via MQTT",
    base:isContainedIn [LaboratoryEnvironment]
]

instance PhysicalCrane : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical structure and controller of the lab-scale gantry crane system",
    base:isContainedIn [LaboratoryEnvironment]
]

instance DigitalTwinSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital twin system integrating models, data, and services for the gantry crane",
    base:isContainedIn [LaboratoryEnvironment]
]

instance OptimalControl : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for precise movement management of the gantry crane",
    DTDFVocab:provides [OptimalControlAction]
]

instance HistoricalDataLogging : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for logging and storing time-series operational data of the crane",
    DTDFVocab:provides [HistoricalDataLoggingAction]
]

instance RealTimeDataVisualization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for real-time monitoring of crane state through visualization dashboards",
    DTDFVocab:provides [RealTimeVisualizationInsight]
]

instance ContinuousValidation : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for ensuring synchronization between physical and digital models through continuous validation",
    DTDFVocab:provides [ModelSynchronizationInsight]
]

instance Gantrylib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module for encapsulating C4 container components in the gantry crane digital twin",
    DTDFVocab:enables [OptimalControl, HistoricalDataLogging, RealTimeDataVisualization, ContinuousValidation]
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform for deploying the digital twin components",
    DTDFVocab:enables [OptimalControl, HistoricalDataLogging, RealTimeDataVisualization, ContinuousValidation]
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for historical data storage of crane operational data",
    DTDFVocab:enables [HistoricalDataLogging]
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time data visualization dashboard tool for monitoring crane state",
    DTDFVocab:enables [RealTimeDataVisualization]
]

instance Mosquitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker facilitating communication between physical and digital components",
    DTDFVocab:enables [HistoricalDataLogging, RealTimeDataVisualization, ContinuousValidation]
]

instance GitHub : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Version control platform for managing digital twin source code",
    DTDFVocab:enables [ContinuousValidation]
]

instance GantryCraneCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric representation of the lab-scale gantry crane using CAD",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo [Fusion360]
]

instance GantryCraneKinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Motion simulation model for the gantry crane system",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo [Fusion360]
]

instance C4ArchitecturalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C4 model for visualizing the architecture of the gantry crane digital twin system",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo [Gantrylib]
]

instance GantryCraneSensors : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors within the physical gantry crane structure and controller measuring state data",
    base:isContainedIn [LaboratoryEnvironment],
    DTDFVocab:producedData [CraneStateDataTransmitted]
]

instance CraneStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom [GantryCraneSensors],
    base:desc "Crane state data transmitted via MQTT protocol"
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data capturing crane operational state",
    DTDFVocab:fromData [CraneStateDataTransmitted],
    DTDFVocab:inputTo [TimescaleDB, Grafana]
]

instance LaboratoryEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Laboratory environment for research and education using a lab-scale gantry crane system",
    base:contains [PhysicalCrane, DigitalTwinSystem, GantryCraneSensors, PhysicalCraneInterface]
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands from the Trajectory Generator Service are transmitted via MQTT to the Control Application, which uses the Physical Crane Interface to execute movements on the physical crane."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system uses the C4 Model for architectural visualization and adopts an ad-hoc approach without a commercial digital twin framework, leveraging containerization for deployment to support logistics and cyber-physical systems applications."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The system uses MQTT for inter-service communication signaling."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The entire system runs on a personal computer with all software components deployed locally. The Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard services are containerized using Docker, ensuring consistent and isolated execution environments."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The system utilizes the C4 Model [5] for architecture visualization, creating context and container diagrams to structure software components."
]
